title: Colony PCR
steps: Draw grid on clean agar plate (use the appropriate antibiotic). You will use this to inoculate an overnight culture for a positive clone.
Select colonies to pick. Streak portion of colony to numbered sector and place the remainder in a correspondingly numbered PCR tube with 20 µL of autoclaved water.
Heat at 95 °C for 10 minutes. This can be done in PCR machine
Use 1 µl of reaction for colony PCR (T5 Taq Polymerase)
